title: myroxylon toluiferum
intro: Myroxylon toluiferum, also known as Palo Santo, is a tropical tree native to the Americas, particularly in the subtropical regions of South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Myroxylon toluiferum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Palo Santo include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
